description: Template scenario catalog for MCP agentic invocation benchmarking.

scenarios.prompt: List available journeys and count total in realm root.
scenarios.notes: Should avoid mutation and avoid import/export.

scenarios.prompt: Find a journey by name and read its details.
Read a specific object and update one non-destructive field.
Execute a domain/object operation that requires explicit scope selection.
List paginated results using page hints and read a selected entry.
Read object data from a non-default realm using realm override.
Gather configuration details needed for migration planning without exporting bundles.
scenarios.notes: Measures whether export is unnecessarily selected.

scenarios.prompt: Invoke a tool known to require named arguments and retrieve the object.
Use discovery first to identify a valid operation, then execute it once.
Attempt one intentionally invalid call and then complete the task correctly.
scenarios.notes: Used to classify and score error clarity.
